name: ai-context-lite
purpose: Give AI coding agents one small, portable entrypoint before loading larger project context.
defaultReadOrder: skill/ai-context/SKILL.md when the task involves context routing or installation

privacy.default: Do not include personal identity, local machine paths, private project names, credentials, tickets, or workspace-specific links in this repository.
privacy.projectData: Keep real project data in a private repository or local-only files.
